name: Dr. Charles Ogden Gears
description:
• ⚙️〢Emotionless, but he's still a human.

[SCP/Personnel User]

Description; Dr. Charles Ogden Gears, M.S (Born 18 August 1956) is a high-ranking scientist in the Foundation. Gears is the current Director of Site-17, former Director of Euclid-level Containment at Site-19, and also the former Facility 23 supervisor. He was known having a personality almost indistinguishable as a robot, but it was only a rumour.
creator: Dr_Skylynn
